_comment: F2 after-preferred case: preferred [0, 500] at the start of hard TW [0, 5000]. Travel from vehicle start to pickup is 1000s, so earliest feasible arrival is 1000 (= 500 past preferred.end). The M4 pass does NOT pull earlier (design: shift-late only), so soft cost is cost_per_second_after * (arrival - preferred.end) = 0.5 * (1000 - 500) = 250.
